name: 火焰枪
dese: <outline color=black width=2>使用<color=#EA8D0B>火焰枪</c>，持续对前方造成伤害</outline>

name: 火焰枪++
dese: <outline color=black width=2>火焰枪持续越久<color=#EA8D0B>伤害越高</outline>

name: 暴风雪
dese: <outline color=black width=2>使用<color=#EA8D0B>冰咒</c>，随机攻击一片区域</outline>

name: 暴风雪++
dese: <outline color=black width=2>冰咒伤害和范围每波都会<color=#EA8D0B>提高</outline>

name: 混天绫
dese: <outline color=black width=2>使用<color=#EA8D0B>混天绫</c>交叉攻击远处</outline>

name: 旋风飞斧++
dese: <outline color=black width=2>乾坤圈飞到顶端会<color=#EA8D0B>返回</outline>

name: 灵魂践踏++
dese: <outline color=black width=2>裂空爪<color=#EA8D0B>50%</c>几率重复释放一次</outline>
